debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x y : α
h✝ : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
h : G.Adj x y
⊢ Matroid.Series (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x y

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : G.inessential x := h x
  have h₂ : G.inessential y := h y
  have h₃ : x ≠ y := by
    intro hxy
    rw [hxy] at h
    have h₄ := h.nodup
    simp_all [Graph.Adj]
  have h₄ : x ∈ V(G) := by
    have h₅ := h₁
    simp only [Graph.inesential] at h₅
    rcases h₅ with ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩
    have h₆ := hM'.1
    simp_all [Graph.Mem, Graph.Vertices]
    <;> aesop
  have h₅ : y ∈ V(G) := by
    have h₆ := h₂
    simp only [Graph.inesential] at h₆
    rcases h₆ with ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩
    have h₇ := hM'.1
    simp_all [Graph.Mem, Graph.Vertices]
    <;> aesop
  have h₆ : ¬G.Infinite := by
    have h₇ := h₁
    simp only [Graph.inesential] at h₇
    rcases h₇ with ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩
    have h₈ : G.Infinite → False := by
      intro hG
      have h₉ := hM'.1
      simp_all [Graph.Mem, Graph.Vertices]
      <;> aesop
    tauto
  have h₇ : G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
    simp_all [Graph.matchingMatroid, Matroid.Series]
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try
      {
        exfalso
        have h₈ := h₁
        simp only [Graph.inesential] at h₈
        rcases h₈ with ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩
        have h₉ := hM'.1
        simp_all [Graph.Mem, Graph.Vertices]
        <;> aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        exfalso
        have h₈ := h₂
        simp only [Graph.inesential] at h₈
        rcases h₈ with ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩
        have h₉ := hM'.1
        simp_all [Graph.Mem, Graph.Vertices]
        <;> aesop
      })
  exact h₇

have h₁ := h x
  have h₂ := h y
  have h₃ := h
  simp_all [Graph.inessential]
  <;>
  try simp_all [Graph.Adj]
  <;>
  try aesop

have h₁ : G.Adj x y := h
  -- The rest of the proof would go here, but since we're focusing on replacing the sorry,
  -- we'll just provide a trivial proof. In a real scenario, we would elaborate further.
  simp_all [Graph.Adj, Graph.inessential, Matroid.Series]
  <;> aesop

have hxy : G.Adj x y := by assumption
  have h1 : @matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) = V(G) := rfl
  have h2 : @matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) = V(G) := rfl
  have h3 : x ∈ @matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) := by
    rw [h2]
    exact hxy.P_fst
  have h4 : y ∈ @matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) := by
    rw [h2]
    exact hxy.P_snd
  have h5 : x ∈ (@matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G)) := by
    rw [h2]
    exact hxy.P_fst
  have h6 : y ∈ (@matroidOfIndepGraph.E α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G)) := by
    rw [h2]
    exact hxy.P_snd
  have h7 : G.inessential x := h x
  have h8 : G.inessential y := h y
  have h9 : @matroidOfIndepGraph.IsColoop (Graph α β) α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) x ↔ x ∈ V(G) ∧ @Graph.inessential α β G x := by
    rfl
  have h10 : ¬ @matroidOfIndepGraph.IsColoop (Graph α β) α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) x := by
    have h11 : G.inessential x := h x
    simp_all [h9]
  have h11 : ¬ @matroidOfIndepGraph.IsColoop (Graph α β) α _ _ (matchingIndepMatroid G) y := by
    have h12 : G.inessential y := h y
    simp_all [h9]
  have h12 : (if x = y then True else False) = False := by
    split_ifs <;> simp_all [hxy.ne']
    <;> try contradiction
  have h13 : (if x = y then True else False) = False := by
    split_ifs <;> simp_all [hxy.ne']
    <;> try contradiction
  -- Simplify the goal to show that x and y are in the same connected component and x ≠ y
  have h14 : x ≠ y := hxy.ne'
  -- Use the fact that x and y are adjacent to show they are in the same connected component
  have h15 : x ≠ y := hxy.ne'
  -- Since x and y are in the same component and x ≠ y, they are in the same coloop-free set
  -- This implies that they are in the same series pair in the matchingMatroid
  simp_all [matroidOfIndepGraph.Series]
  <;> try_tactic
  <;> (try contradiction)
  <;> (try simp_all [hxy.ne'])
  <;> (try tauto)
  <;> (try aesop)
  <;> (try omega)

  have h₂ := h₁ x
  have h₃ := h₁ y

  have h2 : G.inessential y := h y

refine' ⟨_, ⟨x, y⟩, _⟩
  · -- Prove that x and y are in the ground set of the matroid
    simp_all [Graph.mem_essential, matchingMatroid, IndepMatroid.groundSet, mem_coe,
      IndepMatroid.independent_iff]
    <;>
    aesop
  · -- Prove that the pair {x, y} is a series pair
    have h₁ := h x
    have h₂ := h y
    simp_all [Graph.inessential, Graph.mem_essential, matchingMatroid, IndepMatroid.groundSet, mem_coe,
      IndepMatroid.independent_iff]
    <;>
    aesop

have h₁ : x ∈ V(G) := by
    simp [Graph.mem_V]
  have h₂ : y ∈ V(G) := by
    simp [Graph.mem_V]
  have h₃ : G.inessential x := h x
  have h₄ : G.inessential y := h y
  have h₅ : x ≠ y → G.Adj x y := by
    intro hxy
    exact h
  have h₆ : x = y → G.Adj x y := by
    intro hxy
    simp_all [hxy]
    <;> aesop
  by_cases h₇ : x = y
  · get h₆ h₇
  · get h₅ h₇
  <;> aesop
  <;> simp_all [G.inessential]
  <;> aesop
  <;> simp_all [G.inessential]
  <;> aesop

haveI : Fact (Inhabited α) := ⟨x⟩
  haveI : Fact (Inhabited α) := ⟨x⟩
  -- Use the given condition that every vertex is inessential to show that x and y are a series pair.
